category_sources: source_facts.description says Installer for the general purpose language Haskell; official GHCup site says it is the main installer for Haskell.
display_name_sources: Official Haskell GHCup site uses GHCup as the product name; source_facts.name is ghcup.
docs_sources: Official haskell.org GHCup site provides dedicated User Guide, Installation, and landing documentation pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplied as https://github.com/haskell/ghcup-hs; per instruction repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a Haskell installer; official GHCup User Guide documents CLI and TUI toolchain management for GHC and related tools.
